description_long: This is a pair of open-toe flip-flop sandals featuring a prominent red synthetic upper strap with black accent stitching and a black toe post. The footbed is gray with a slightly textured appearance and features a stitched border detail, as well as a decorative emblem near the heel area. The sole appears to be made of a durable, slightly flexible material, likely rubber or EVA foam, providing comfort and grip. The overall design is casual and sporty, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or casual outings. The sandals are lightweight and easy to slip on and off, with no laces or fasteners. The condition appears pristine, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A pair of red and gray flip-flop sandals with black toe posts, decorative stitching, and a logo emblem on the footbed. The sandals are clean, new, and designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, red straps, and logo emblems on the footbeds.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the curved red straps, black toe posts, and the stitched border around the gray footbeds.
description_view_2: Direct view of the toe posts and the detailed stitching along the edge of the footbeds.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the profile of the red straps, black toe posts, and the logo emblems near the heels.
attribute_logo: shield-shaped emblem with stylized 'S' near the heel area in white and gold
